text: - I. Primary and Non-Contributory. All insurance coverage required herein shall be primary to and shall seek no contribution  from  all  insurance  available  to  Contractor  Parties,  with  Contractor  Parties'  insurance  being excess,  secondary  and  non-contributing.  Where  necessary,  coverage  shall  be  endorsed  to  provide  such primary liability, and the certificate of insurance shall reflect the same.
